arcade.intro:
"Streamer Luck" (Win with different heroes in Community Crafted) challenge requirement reduced from 20 to 3.
"Chat, Are We Cooked?" meta challenge challenges completed requirement reduced from 14 to 13.
"Clickbait Mitigation" damage mitigation requirement reduced from 15,000 to 5,000.
